name: Solar Darke (Stage 3)
description: The ultimate dark solar predator. It absorbs light from surrounding celestial bodies to fuel dark solar blasts that bypass dimensional shields.
originLore: Forged during a total multiversal eclipse when solar power and void shadows collided. Solar Darke feeds on both light and darkness.

lore.celestialConcordance: Solar Darke absorbs excess light during stellar overcharges, shielding surrounding systems from blinding solar destruction.

quantumResonators.name: Eclipse Beam
quantumResonators.description: Fires a dual beam of blinding light and pitch dark energy that destabilizes defense shields.

quantumResonators.name: Shadow Corona
quantumResonators.description: Surrounds itself in a shadowy solar flare that absorbs incoming energy attacks.
